metadata.description: Syncfusion React plugins for GitHub Copilot

plugins.name: syncfusion-react-3d-chart
plugins.description: Syncfusion React 3D Chart skill plugin: 3D column/bar/stacked charts with axes, data binding, labels, legend, tooltip, selection, print/export, theming, and accessibility.

plugins.name: syncfusion-react-3d-circular-chart
plugins.description: Syncfusion React 3D Circular Chart skill plugin: 3D pie/donut charts with labels, legend, tooltip, export/print, and empty point handling.

plugins.name: syncfusion-react-accordion
plugins.description: Syncfusion React Accordion skill plugin: collapsible content panels with expand modes, animations, dynamic content, styling, events, and accessibility.
